metadata.title: EKS Kubernetes
metadata.subtitle: Kubernetes Stacks & Atomics
metadata.description: Comprehensive collection of AWS Elastic Kubernetes Service (EKS) templates and container orchestration components. This group offers two distinct sections: 'Select a Configuration' with complete ready-to-deploy Kubernetes clusters for non-production and production environments, and 'Building Blocks' with container-related components for users building custom microservices architectures.
pillars: Managed Orchestration: Highly available Kubernetes control plane managed by AWS
Security First: Secure node groups in private subnets with RBAC integration
Scalable Foundation: Ready for auto-scaling microservices and containerized apps
Operational Excellence: Integrated CloudWatch monitoring and logging
Developer Friendly: Standardized cluster configurations with sample deployments

configuration.title: Kubernetes Clusters & Components
